Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: Added Line Go Up — gil tracking expansion: quest/duty/FATE rewards, repair/FC chest/custom delivery/wondrous tails captures, passive retainer sale capture (no AutoPinch required), chat catch-all safety net, category hover tooltips, and a new dashboard with gil history chart, filterable transactions, daily changes, and earned-vs-spent breakdown.
